reason: Browser use feature successfully navigated to https://example.com and retrieved page title matching expected result
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agent list
Found and clicked "QA-20260506-193107-yuvm" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message displayed in input field
Sent message using Ctrl+Enter — Message successfully sent, agent status changed to "working", new session created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed task in 15 seconds, response received with "The page title is \"Example Domain\""

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states the page title is "Example Domain", browser preview panel shows the correct webpage, two tool calls executed successfully (Open Browser and Browser Command)
